records.m_Talk_ENG: How long are you just going to stand there drooling?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How long are you just going to stand there drooling?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How long are you just going to stand there drooling?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, is this about your book?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, is this about your book?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, is this about your book?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, but I can't walk right now, so you'll have to come get it yourself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, but I can't walk right now, so you'll have to come get it yourself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, but I can't walk right now, so you'll have to come get it yourself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And while you're at it, mind saving me too...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And while you're at it, mind saving me too...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And while you're at it, mind saving me too...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's not displaying any signs of the Red Moon phenomenon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's not displaying any signs of the Red Moon phenomenon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's not displaying any signs of the Red Moon phenomenon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Or perhaps only the madness has manifested.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Or perhaps only the madness has manifested.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Or perhaps only the madness has manifested.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When did she get behind me...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: When did she get behind me...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: When did she get behind me...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I told you to take the book, not my blood...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I told you to take the book, not my blood...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I told you to take the book, not my blood...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you're gonna take my blood, at least pay for it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you're gonna take my blood, at least pay for it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you're gonna take my blood, at least pay for it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And yet, you managed to escape all the way here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And yet, you managed to escape all the way here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And yet, you managed to escape all the way here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As expected, the taste was as good as the scent, Junk food.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As expected, the taste was as good as the scent, Junk food.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As expected, the taste was as good as the scent, Junk food.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And you, lord of the estate. I am no chimera of the Northern Union.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And you, lord of the estate. I am no chimera of the Northern Union.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And you, lord of the estate. I am no chimera of the Northern Union.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Consuming blood, and recovering after being shot through the heart.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Consuming blood, and recovering after being shot through the heart.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Consuming blood, and recovering after being shot through the heart.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Does this mean you're afflicted by the Pale Moon phenomenon?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Does this mean you're afflicted by the Pale Moon phenomenon?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Does this mean you're afflicted by the Pale Moon phenomenon?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah! That's why she called it a curse...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah! That's why she called it a curse...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah! That's why she called it a curse...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Junk food, your blood was quite warm and flavorful.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Junk food, your blood was quite warm and flavorful.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Junk food, your blood was quite warm and flavorful.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was... almost euphoric. But that's embarrassing, so I won't mention it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was... almost euphoric. But that's embarrassing, so I won't mention it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was... almost euphoric. But that's embarrassing, so I won't mention it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A-anyway, I'll at least thank you since you saved me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A-anyway, I'll at least thank you since you saved me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A-anyway, I'll at least thank you since you saved me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a relief that even heretics like you can be of some use.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a relief that even heretics like you can be of some use.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a relief that even heretics like you can be of some use.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Truly, the Lord has created all beings with a purpose.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Truly, the Lord has created all beings with a purpose.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Truly, the Lord has created all beings with a purpose.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am Katharina. An apprentice nun of the Holy Curia's Religious Order.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am Katharina. An apprentice nun of the Holy Curia's Religious Order.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am Katharina. An apprentice nun of the Holy Curia's Religious Order.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And you, lord of the estate. I will judge you in the name of the Lord!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And you, lord of the estate. I will judge you in the name of the Lord!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And you, lord of the estate. I will judge you in the name of the Lord!
